entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species studied, specifically local and improved cultivars from Mali

entities.name: ROOT SYSTEM
entities.description: The underground organs of the plant responsible for water and mineral uptake

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: The country where the sorghum cultivars were collected and studied

entities.name: SAHELIAN ZONE
entities.description: The specific region in Mali where the sorghum cultivars were sourced

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: A condition of limited water availability that affects crop performance

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH
entities.description: A measurement of the distance the roots extend into the soil

entities.name: ROOT DENSITY
entities.description: A measurement of the concentration of roots within a given volume of soil

entities.name: ROOT CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of studying and describing the physical properties of the root system

entities.name: COMPLETELY RANDOMIZED DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental layout used for planting the sorghum entries in PVC tubes

entities.name: ROOT ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The spatial configuration of the root system

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The overall development of the plant supported by root functions

entities.name: ANNUAL RAINFALL
entities.description: The yearly amount of precipitation in the Sahelian zone, ranging from 200 to 600 mm
